name: ExtensionRequestOrchestration_Action_RelatedAction_EndRelationship
title: R5: before | before-start | before-end | concurrent | concurrent-with-start | concurrent-with-end | after | after-start | after-end (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `RequestOrchestration.action.relatedAction.endRelationship` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`RequestOrchestration.action.relatedAction.endRelationship` 0..1 `code`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `RequestOrchestration.action.relatedAction.endRelationship` 0..1 `code`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `RequestOrchestration.action.relatedAction.endRelationship` has a context of RequestGroup.action.relatedAction based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `RequestGroup`.
Element `RequestOrchestration.action.relatedAction.endRelationship` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: before | before-start | before-end | concurrent | concurrent-with-start | concurrent-with-end | after | after-start | after-end (new)

binding.description: Defines the types of relationships between actions.
